title: Looking for Teacher at IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd in Srinagar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd:
IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd!
